actions.name: Whirlpool
actions.description: Effect: All valid targets gain @Affliction[bound 5]. While @Affliction[bound], targets also suffer from @Affliction[drowning]. This @Affliction[bound] effect can be removed with a Challenging Flying or Swim Skill Check or an Intense Movement-related Skill or Acrobatics Skill Check taken as a Simple Action.

actions.name: Whirlpool (Empowered)
actions.description:
Trigger: The targeted creature(s) are Swimming.

Effect: Effect: All valid targets gain @Affliction[bound 5]. While @Affliction[bound], targets also suffer from @Affliction[drowning]. This @Affliction[bound] effect can be removed with a Challenging Flying or Swim Skill Check or an Intense Movement-related Skill or Acrobatics Skill Check taken as a Simple Action.
